content.text:
I now have a clear view of atom 4 (N) and its neighbours. From the zoomed-in image, I can see that atom N:4 is covalently connected to exactly two neighbour atoms.

## Results

**Atom 4 (N) has the following neighbour atoms:**

| Atomic Index | Element |
|--------------|---------|
| 3 | C |
| 5 | C |

**Geomconf_index:** 6381

Atom 4 (nitrogen, shown in blue) is covalently bonded to:
- Carbon atom C:3 (on the left side, connected to N:4)
- Carbon atom C:5 (on the right side, connected to N:4)

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 4, whose element should be N. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
